name: get-available-resources
tagline: Detects local CPU/GPU/memory/disk resources and writes a JSON recommendation file to guide computational strategy for scientific tasks.
verdict: Clean, narrowly-scoped skill: runs a local script to report CPU/GPU/memory/disk and writes results to .claude_resources.json. No network calls, no credential access, no destructive or obfuscated behavior found in the SKILL.md text. Minor gaps: no explicit negative-trigger guidance, and its one dependency (psutil) is installed unpinned. Overall low risk to in

highlights.summary: No explicit 'do not use when' / negative-trigger guidance anywhere in the file; a user can't tell when this skill is unnecessary overhead (e.g. trivial scripts).
